ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the UI element (e.g., Labeled, Button) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UI element and its usage */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to which the element belongs */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the element is deprecated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI element that this property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., -fx-alignment) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the property does */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_options" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment option */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this option belongs to */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the alignment option (e.g., top-left, center) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default alignment option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_options_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_overrun_options" (
  "overrun_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text overrun option */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this option belongs to */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the text overrun option (e.g., ellipsis, clip) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default text overrun option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overrun_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_overrun_options_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "font_styles" (
  "font_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font style */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this font style belongs to */,
  "font_name" TEXT /* Name of the font style (e.g., Arial, Verdana) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default font style */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the style was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the style was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("font_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_font_styles_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_wrapping" (
  "wrap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wrap configuration */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property this configuration belongs to */,
  "wrap_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if text wrapping is enabled (true/false) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default text wrapping configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wrap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_wrapping_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ui_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI instance */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI element this instance represents */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name given to the instance for reference */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application this instance belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the instance is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_instances_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instance_properties" (
  "instance_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance property */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance this property belongs to */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being set for this instance */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the property for this instance */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is an overridden property value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_properties_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES ui_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instance_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
